Description lacks clarity about input requirements and the asynchronous nature of the operation. Enhanced version specifies the input schema, clarifies the 202 response code meaning, and explains that creation is background-processed, helping AI agents understand they must poll for completion.

data.current_description: Initiates the creation of a board using an AI recipe. Returns a status key to track creation progress.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates asynchronous board creation using an AI recipe. Accepts recipe configuration via AiRecipeBoardCreate schema. Returns a status key (202 Accepted) for polling creation progress. The board creation happens asynchronously in the background and may take time to complete.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about input requirements and the asynchronous nature of the operation. Enhanced version specifies the input schema, clarifies the 202 response code meaning, and explains that creation is background-processed, helping AI agents understand they must poll for completion.

data.current_summary: Get AI recipe board creation status
data.current_description: Checks the status of an AI recipe board creation process.
data.description_suggestion: Checks the status of an AI recipe board creation process using the status key from createAiRecipeBoard.
